hooks.command: name=$(jq -r '.tool_input.skill // empty'); [ -n "$name" ] && grep -q 'context: fork' ".claude/skills/$name/SKILL.md" 2>/dev/null && echo "The '$name' skill ran in FORKED context - its step-by-step instructions are NOT in your context. If you continue its workflow manually (git/API/edits), first Read .claude/skills/$name/SKILL.md and the docs it references, then follow those steps exactly. Do not improvise the remaining steps from memory." >&2; exit 0

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '(docs/llm/.*[.]md|[.]claude/skills/.*[.]md)$' >/dev/null && echo 'Re-read the diff you just wrote. Cut filler, restatements of rules already in the file, prescriptive lists with one obvious item, AI-tone phrasing. If a sentence does not change behaviour for the next reader - delete it. See docs/llm/rules/llm-skills-guide.md.' >&2; exit 0
